underlying_goal: Execute the deacon patrol loop: check hook and mail, then run patrol cycles monitoring the Gas Town system until handoff
friction_detail: Ephemeral SQLite backend had a corrupt empty-ID row that blocked wisp creation and handoff mail sending throughout the session.
brief_summary: User instructed deacon agent to check hook/mail and patrol; Claude completed 20 patrol cycles successfully but was blocked by a SQLite bug on wisp persistence and handoff mail.
